_comment: Faculty layer source registry. These entries APPEND to D.sources[]. All ids use prefix 'src-fac-' to avoid collision with existing src- ids in sources.json. Every sourceIds entry in faculty_seed.json MUST exist here or in sources.json.

sources.title: Find the Best Faculty for NEET PG Preparation at PrepLadder
sources.note: Official PrepLadder faculty roster page listing names, subjects, and brief bios for all NEET PG faculty.

sources.title: Marrow Faculty List
sources.note: Marrow blog page listing their faculty roster with subject assignments.

sources.title: MARROW for NEET PG — from India's top faculty & DailyRounds
sources.note: DailyRounds blog listing 25 Marrow faculty with names, credentials, and subjects.

sources.title: Best faculty for NEET PG, FMGE, NEET SS, PG Residency & MBBS — DocTutorials
sources.note: Official DocTutorials faculty page listing names and subjects for all NEET PG faculty.

sources.title: Cerebellum Teachers — Cerebellum Academy
sources.note: Official Cerebellum Academy faculty directory listing names and subjects.

sources.title: About Us — Cerebellum Academy
sources.note: Confirms the five co-founders of Cerebellum Academy and their roles. Cerebellum founded 2022.

sources.title: Dr. Gobind Rai Garg Pharmacology — Cerebellum Academy
sources.note: Confirms Dr Gobind Rai Garg: MBBS + MD Pharmacology from UCMS Delhi, Ex-Asst Professor at Maulana Azad Medical College, current Cerebellum Pharmacology faculty.

sources.title: The Inspiring Journey of Dr. Gobind Rai Garg — India's Pharmacology Guru
sources.note: Details 18+ years teaching career, UCMS qualifications, Maulana Azad Medical College (MAMC) position, Cerebellum affiliation.

sources.title: PrepLadder Medical Facebook — Dr. Gobind Rai Garg MCQ Marathon (May 2022)
sources.note: May 4, 2022 PrepLadder Facebook post confirms Dr Gobind Rai Garg conducted a live Pharmacology MCQ Marathon session for PrepLadder. Directional evidence of prior PrepLadder association before Cerebellum (founded 2022).

sources.title: Dr. Sparsh Gupta — Cerebellum Academy
sources.note: Confirms Dr Sparsh Gupta: MBBS, MD, Gold Medalist, 17+ years teaching, co-author of Review of Pathology and Genetics. Current Cerebellum Pathology faculty.

sources.title: Dr. Vivek Jain PSM & Community Medicine — Cerebellum Academy
sources.note: Confirms Dr Vivek Jain: MBBS from MAMC, MD PSM from LHMC, Senior Residency at VMMC SJH and UCMS GTBH, author of Review of PSM, current Cerebellum PSM faculty.

sources.title: Dr. Praveen Tripathi — Cerebellum Academy
sources.note: Confirms Dr Praveen Tripathi: UCMS alumnus, Psychiatry specialist, author of Review of Psychiatry, co-founder of Cerebellum Academy.

sources.title: Dr. Apurv Mehra Orthopedics — Cerebellum Academy
sources.note: Confirms Dr Apurv Mehra: MBBS MAMC, MS Orthopedics UCMS, founder of eConceptual (launched 2020), co-founder of Cerebellum Academy (2022).

sources.title: eConceptual — Best Medical PG Residents Preparation Platform
sources.note: Confirms eConceptual is Dr Apurv Mehra's solo platform for PG residents (launched 2020). Orthopedics, Surgery, Anesthesia, Radiology, Psychiatry, OBG.

sources.title: Prepare Surgery Online with Dr. Pritesh Singh at PrepLadder
sources.note: Confirms Dr Pritesh Singh as PrepLadder Surgery faculty. Described as 'India's renowned surgeon', author of Surgery Essence, teaching since 2009.

sources.title: Important Topics in Surgery for NEET-PG by Dr. Pritesh Singh
sources.note: PrepLadder authored article by Dr Pritesh Singh, confirming platform affiliation and Surgery expertise.

sources.title: Prepare Medicine Online with Dr. Deepak Marwah at PrepLadder
sources.note: Confirms Dr Deepak Marwah as PrepLadder Medicine faculty, 15+ years experience, MAMC alumnus.

sources.title: Home — Medicine Buster Classes by Dr. Deepak Marwah
sources.note: Confirms Medicine Buster Classes as Dr Deepak Marwah's solo brand (offline + app + YouTube). MAMC alumnus, author of One Touch Medicine and FMGE Solutions.

sources.title: Prepare Physiology Online with Dr. Soumen Manna at PrepLadder
sources.note: Confirms Dr Soumen Manna as PrepLadder Physiology faculty. MBBS Nil Ratan Sircar Medical College Kolkata, MD Physiology AIIMS Delhi (2012), VMMC Safdarjung associate professor.

sources.title: Soumen Manna — ResearchGate Profile
sources.note: Academic profile confirming Dr Soumen Manna's position at VMMC & Safdarjung Hospital, New Delhi.

sources.title: Prepare Forensic Medicine Online with Dr. Akhilesh Raj at PrepLadder
sources.note: Confirms Dr Akhilesh Raj as PrepLadder Forensic Medicine faculty. MD Forensic Medicine AIIMS Delhi, 10+ years teaching experience.

sources.title: Find Best Faculty for OBS-GYN Residency Preparation at PrepLadder
sources.note: Confirms Dr Shonali Chandra as PrepLadder OBG faculty. MS from MAMC, Gold Medallist MBBS from LLRM Meerut.

sources.title: Meet Dr. Shonali Chandra, Faculty for OBS-GYN Residency at PrepLadder — YouTube
sources.note: PrepLadder official intro video for Dr Shonali Chandra, corroborating platform role and OBG specialization.

sources.title: Marrow Programme for OBS-GYN Residents — Dr. Sakshi Arora Hans
sources.note: Confirms Dr Sakshi Arora Hans as Marrow OBG faculty for NEET SS and NEET PG. National level faculty, author of One Touch OBG.

sources.title: What's new in Marrow Edition 4 — Ob-Gyn by Dr. Sakshi Arora Hans
sources.note: Marrow blog post confirming Dr Sakshi Arora Hans as OBG faculty, with details on her course content.

sources.title: Marrow — SS Surgery (Dr. Rohan Khandelwal)
sources.note: Confirms Dr Rohan Khandelwal as Marrow Surgery faculty.

sources.title: About Dr. Rohan Khandelwal — breasthealth.in
sources.note: Confirms Dr Rohan Khandelwal's clinical qualifications (MBBS + MS Surgery VMMC Safdarjung 2002–2011, MRCS Edinburgh 2011, breast surgery career from 2013). Establishes his clinical identity independently of platform affiliation.

sources.title: Dr. Rakesh Nair — ADRPLEXUS Faculty Profile
sources.note: Third-party profile confirming Dr Rakesh S Nair's Medicine specialization. Marrow faculty affiliation confirmed via Marrow faculty list page and Amazon book listing (MEDICINE MARROW EDITION 8.0).

sources.title: MEDICINE MARROW EDITION 8.0 by Dr Rakesh Nair MBBS, MD(General Medicine), DM(Nephrology) — Amazon.in
sources.note: Confirms Dr Rakesh Nair's credentials (MBBS, MD General Medicine, DM Nephrology) and Marrow authorship.

sources.title: Prepare Pharmacology Online with Dr. Ankit Kumar at PrepLadder
sources.note: Confirms Dr Ankit Kumar as PrepLadder Pharmacology faculty. Gold medal MBBS Maulana Azad Medical College, MD Pharmacology, 12+ years experience, former head faculty at DAMS (Delhi Academy of Medical Sciences).
